variants: Shanaya Banoo is an accomplished artist holding the Kiln Animator Credential, a testament to her skills in animation. Under the watchful guidance of her mentor and doctoral advisor, Celia Tabares, she has cultivated her artistic talents. Her research and contributions have been published in the Hazelstar Manuscript Guild, providing valuable insights into her field. To propel her creative projects, she primarily relies on funding from the Starlit Venture Trust. In addition to her artistic commitments, Shanaya volunteers her time as a Park Volunteer at Sagebriar, helping to enhance her community's environment.
